content: We can reframe the general task-agnostic Self-Refine framework as a foundational base layer that can be augmented with the multi-perspective inconsistency sampling from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to create a hybrid self-improvement pipeline that retains Self-Refine's core advantage of requiring no extra training or supervision while fixing its common flaw of getting stuck in local optima from single-perspective feedback. This hybrid approach enables a single LLM to generate diverse critical feedback from inconsistent problem-solving perspectives without any external data or model finetuning.
